testcase.name: Login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to login page..............................................passed When I login with "valid" credentials.......................................passed Then I should see the home page.............................................passed

testcase.name: Login with Invalid Username

failure.message:
[2mexpect([22m[31mlocator[39m[2m).[22mtoHaveText[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m)[22m failed
Locator: locator('//h3[text()=\'Ninza-HRM\']') Expected: [32m"Ninza-HRM"[39m Timeout: 2000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: [2m - Expect "to.have.text" with timeout 2000ms[22m [2m - waiting for locator('//h3[text()=\'Ninza-HRM\']')[22m

testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to login page..............................................passed When I login with "invalidUser" credentials.................................passed Then I should not see the home page.........................................failed
